register.success: Registration successful. Please check your email for verification code.

verify.success: Email verified successfully. Your account is now active.

resend.success: Verification code resent. Please check your email.

errors.email_already_exists: An account with this email already exists
errors.email_already_exists_deleted: An account with this email was previously deleted. Please contact support to restore your account or use a different email.
errors.username_already_exists_deleted: This username was used by a deleted account. Please contact support to restore your account or use a different username.
errors.account_not_verified: Please verify your email before logging in
errors.invalid_code: Invalid verification code. You have {attempts} attempt(s) remaining.
errors.code_expired: Verification code has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.code_still_valid: Verification code is still valid. Please wait {minutes} minute(s) and {seconds} second(s) before requesting a new one.
errors.code_still_valid_seconds: Verification code is still valid. Please wait {seconds} second(s) before requesting a new one.
errors.account_locked: Account locked due to too many failed verification attempts. Please try again in {minutes} minute(s) and {seconds} second(s).
errors.account_locked_seconds: Account locked due to too many failed verification attempts. Please try again in {seconds} second(s).
errors.verification_locked: Your account is temporarily locked due to too many incorrect verification attempts. Please wait {minutes} minute(s) and {seconds} second(s) before trying again.
errors.verification_locked_seconds: Your account is temporarily locked due to too many incorrect verification attempts. Please wait {seconds} second(s) before trying again.
errors.invalid_code_last_attempt: Invalid verification code. This is your last attempt before account lockout.
errors.too_many_verification_attempts: Too many incorrect verification attempts. Code has been invalidated. Please request a new code.

validation.code_length: Verification code must be exactly 6 digits
validation.code_numeric: Verification code must contain only numbers
